agreement_metrics: Krippendorff alpha where multi-label or missing-label handling is needed
annotation_plan.resolution: adjudication after independent annotator_a and annotator_b passes

intended_use: two-annotator review package for building an independent naturalistic holdout after agreement analysis and adjudication
not_intended_use: not human-audited gold; do not report benchmark scores as gold labels until annotation, agreement, and adjudication are complete
redaction_note: Candidate snippets are still public issue-derived text. Obvious token/email/long-secret patterns were redacted and code blocks omitted, but human reviewers should re-check before public release.
relationship_to_gapbench: independent candidate set; not generated from GapBench templates and not a rewrite of GapBench tasks
source_policy: public GitHub issues only; unauthenticated API; no private data; no user API keys or HF tokens used
